SEARCH

Package graph

package graph
  • Class
    Description
    Agent
    Represents a participant in the publish-subscribe system that can listen to and publish messages.
    IncAgent
    An agent that increments a numeric topic value by one.
    Message
    An immutable message object that can hold data as bytes, text, or numeric values.
    MinAgent
    An agent that subtracts the second numeric topic value from the first one.
    MulAgent
    An agent that multiplies two numeric topic values and publishes the result.
    ParallelAgent
    Wraps an agent to handle callbacks asynchronously in a separate worker thread.
    PlusAgent
    An agent that adds two numeric topic values and publishes the result.
    Topic
    Represents a communication channel in the publish-subscribe system.
    TopicManagerSingleton
    Thread-safe singleton providing access to the central topic manager.
    TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    The actual topic manager that holds all topics.
